one_liner: Waterfall.io is a B2B contact/company data enrichment API (prospecting, search, enrichment, verification) accessed via a REST API secured with x-api-key headers, sold on a prepaid credit model.

auth_methods.notes: All requests authenticated via x-api-key header; master key available for enterprise sub-key management.

self_serve_notes: No free tier; prepaid usage-based credit model with no long-term contract required. Developers sign up to receive an API key, but purchase is required (contract/credits) to use the API. Some account reporting endpoints are free of credit charge.

api_surface.notes: Multiple endpoints covering Prospector, Search Contact/Company, Contact/Phone/Company Enrichment, Company Reveal, Company Titles, Job Change Detection, Email Verification, Webhook JWKS, Account Reporting, and API Key Management.

main_blocker: No self-serve free access; requires purchasing prepaid credits/contract to obtain an API key, and no existing MCP server was found.

evidence.supports: All requests authenticated using x-api-key header; base URL https://api.waterfall.io/v1/
Lists full set of REST endpoints (Prospector, Search Contact, Search Company, Enrichment endpoints, Email Verification, Account Reporting, API Key Management) all requiring x-api-key.
Enterprise master key can generate and manage sub-keys.

flags: no free tier - prepaid credits required
no evidence of existing MCP server
API key issuance tied to signing a contract per docs
